game.title: Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor
game.description:
Note: certain features for the Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor videogame will no longer be available beginning Dec. 31, 2020.

Affected Features: 
 
• The Nemesis Forge feature will no longer be available. Therefore, players will no longer be able to transfer their in-game Nemeses from Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor to Middle-earth: Shadow of War.
 
• Vendetta missions and Leaderboards will no longer be available. 
 
• WBPlay will no longer be available, but the epic runes "Orc Hunter" and "Gravewalker" will automatically be awarded to all players.

Winner of over 50 “Best of 2014” Awards including Game of the Year, Best Action Game and Most Innovative Game.

localized_title.text: La Tierra Media: Sombras de Mordor
La Terre du Milieu: L'Ombre du Mordor
La Terra di Mezzo: L'Ombra di Mordor

localized_description.text:
Note: certain features for the Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor videogame will no longer be available beginning Dec. 31, 2020.

Affected Features: 
 
• The Nemesis Forge feature will no longer be available. Therefore, players will no longer be able to transfer their in-game Nemeses from Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor to Middle-earth: Shadow of War.
 
• Vendetta missions and Leaderboards will no longer be available. 
 
• WBPlay will no longer be available, but the epic runes "Orc Hunter" and "Gravewalker" will automatically be awarded to all players.

Winner of over 50 “Best of 2014” Awards including Game of the Year, Best Action Game and Most Innovative Game.

Nota: Algunas funciones del videojuego La Tierra Media: Sombras de Mordor dejarán de estar disponibles a partir del 31 de diciembre de 2020.

Funciones afectadas:
 
• La función Forja de Némesis dejará de estar disponible. Así pues, los jugadores ya no podrán trasferir sus némesis del juego de La Tierra Media: Sombras de Mordor a La Tierra Media: Sombras de Guerra.
 
• Las misiones de revancha y los marcadores dejarán de estar disponibles.
 
• WBPlay dejará de estar disponible, pero todos los jugadores recibirán como recompensa las runas épicas Cazador de orcos y Aparición de forma automática.

Ganador de más de 50 premios "Best of 2014", como Mejor juego del año, Mejor juego de acción y Juego más innovador.

Remarque : certaines fonctionnalités du jeu vidéo La Terre du Milieu: L'Ombre du Mordor ne seront plus disponibles à partir du 31 décembre 2020.

Fonctionnalités affectées :
 
• La fonctionnalité Forge Nemesis ne sera plus disponible. Par conséquent, les joueurs ne pourront plus transférer leurs ennemis jurés en jeu de la Terre du Milieu: L'Ombre du Mordor vers la Terre du Milieu: L'Ombre de la Guerre.
 
• Les missions Vendetta et les classements ne seront plus disponibles.
 
• WBPlay ne sera plus disponible, mais les runes épiques "Chasseur d'Orques" et "Immortel" seront automatiquement attribuées à tous les joueurs.

Gagnant de plus de 50 prix "Best of 2014", dont le jeu de l'année, le meilleur jeu d'action et le jeu le plus innovant.

Achtung: Einige Funktionen des Videospiels Mittelerde: Mordors Schatten werden ab dem 31. Dezember 2020 nicht mehr verfügbar sein.

Betroffene Funktionen:
 
• Die Erzfeind-Schmiede wird nicht länger verfügbar sein. Also können Spieler ihre Erzfeinde von Mittelerde: Mordors Schatten nicht länger zu Mittelerde: Schatten des Krieges übertragen.
 
• Blutrache-Aufträge und Bestenlisten werden nicht länger verfügbar sein.
 
• WBPlay wird nicht länger verfügbar sein, aber die epischen Runen Ork-Schlächter und Grabwandler werden allen Spielern automatisch verliehen.

Gewinner von über 50 "Best of 2014" Auszeichnungen, inklusive Game of the Year, Best Action Game und Most Innovative Game.

Nota: determinadas funcionalidades do videojogo Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor deixarão de estar disponíveis a partir de 31 de dezembro de 2020.
   
  Funcionalidades afetadas: 
  • A funcionalidade Nemesis Forge deixará de estar disponível. Portanto, os jogadores não poderão transferir os seus Nemeses do jogo entre Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor e Middle-earth: Shadow of War.
  • As missões Vendetta e as Leaderboards não estarão disponíveis. 
  • WBPlay não estará disponível, mas as runas épicas "Orc Hunter" e "Gravewalker" serão concedidas automaticamente a todos os jogadores.
  
  Vencedor de mais de 50 prémios “Melhor de 2014”, incluindo o Jogo do Ano, Melhor Jogo de Ação e Jogo Mais Inovador.

Bemærk: Visse funktioner i videospillet Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor vil ikke længere være tilgængelige fra 31. dec. 2020.
   
  Berørte funktioner: 
  • Nemesis Forge-funktionen vil ikke længere være tilgængelig. Derfor vil spillere ikke længere kunne overføre deres Nemesis i spillet fra Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor til Middle-earth: Shadow of War.
  • Vendetta-missioner og leaderboards vil ikke længere være tilgængelige. 
  • WBPlay vil ikke længere være tilgængelig, men de episke runer "Orc Hunter" og "Gravewalker" vil automatisk blive tildelt alle spillere.
  
  Vinder af over 50 "Best of 2014"-præmier herunder Game of the Year, Best Action Game og Most Innovative Game.

Attenzione: dal 31 dicembre 2020 alcune funzionalità de La Terra di Mezzo: L'Ombra di Mordor non saranno più disponibili.

Funzionalità non più disponibili: 
 
• la Forgia Nemesi non sarà più disponibile. I giocatori non potranno più trasferire le loro Nemesi da La Terra di Mezzo: L'Ombra di Mordor a La Terra di Mezzo: L'Ombra della Guerra.
 
• Le missioni di Faida e le classifiche non saranno più disponibili. 
 
• WBPlay non sarà più disponibile, ma le rune epiche "Cacciatore di Orchi" e "Senzamorte" saranno automaticamente conferite a tutti i giocatori.

Vincitore di oltre 50 premi "Best of 2014", tra cui Gioco dell'anno, Miglior gioco d'azione e Videogioco più innovativo.

注意：《中土世界：魔多之影》中的部分功能将于2020年12月31日之后停用。
  受影响的功能：
  • “宿敌恩仇”功能将不再可用。因此，玩家们无法再将游戏中的宿敌从《中土世界：魔多之影》转移到《中土世界：战争之影》中了。
  • “世仇”任务及排行榜将不再可用。
  • WBPlay将不再可用，不过，史诗符文“半兽人猎手”和“墓穴行者”将自动奖励给所有玩家。
  
  荣获超过50项“2014最佳游戏”奖项，包括年度最佳游戏、最佳动作游戏，以及最佳创新游戏。

注意：《中土世界：魔多之影》電玩的部分功能自2020年12月31日起將無法再使用。
   
  受影響的功能如下：
  • 「宿敵創造」功能將無法再使用。屆時，玩家無法再將其《中土世界：魔多之影》遊戲中的宿敵轉移至《中土世界：戰爭之影》。
  • 世仇任務及排行榜將無法再使用。
  • WBPlay將無法再使用，但所有玩家都將自動獲得史詩神符「半獸人獵手」及「墓穴行者」。
  
  贏得超過 50 項「2014 年度電玩」獎項，包括「年度遊戲」、「最佳動作遊戲」以及「最佳創新遊戲」。

お知らせ：「シャドウ・オブ・モルドール」のゲームの下記の一定機能が2020年12月31日より利用できなくなります。
 

 
影響を受ける機能：
 
•「Nemesis Forge」機能が利用できなくなります。したがって、プレイヤーはゲーム内のネメシスを「シャドウ・オブ・モルドール」から「シャドウ・オブ・ウォー」に転送できなくなります。
 
• 抗争ミッションとランキングが利用できなくなります。
 
• WBPlayが利用できなくなりますが、エピックルーンの「オークの狩人」と「墓を歩く者」は自動的に全てのプレイヤーに授与されます。

Game of the Year、Best Action Game、Most Innovative Gameなど、50を超える「Best of 2014」賞を受賞。

Note: certain features for the Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor videogame will no longer be available beginning Dec. 31, 2020.

Affected Features: 
 
• The Nemesis Forge feature will no longer be available. Therefore, players will no longer be able to transfer their in-game Nemeses from Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor to Middle-earth: Shadow of War.
 
• Vendetta missions and Leaderboards will no longer be available. 
 
• WBPlay will no longer be available, but the epic runes "Orc Hunter" and "Gravewalker" will automatically be awarded to all players.

Winner of over 50 “Best of 2014” Awards including Game of the Year, Best Action Game and Most Innovative Game.

game.title: Party Club
game.description:
PLAY WITH FRIENDS! 
  Play solo or with up to 4 friends in couch mode or online co-op mode, and turn your venue into the hottest spot in the region.
  
   
   
   
   SEAT AND SERVE 
  Greet customers at the door, choose their seats, and manage their satisfaction. If someone’s too much to handle, you can always give them the boot—literally!
  
     
   BE AWARE OF CUSTOMER TYPES 
  Your customers are animals with unique personalities and seating preferences. Be careful—seating a panda next to a tiger might not end well! 
   You better watch out for special customers, while some may involuntarily release gas and knock you out, others may try to knock you out with old methods.    
  
     
   ORGANIZE YOUR VENUE 
  Set up tables, juice machines, and even toilets wherever you like! Make purchases at the end of each day and strategize your layout to handle the flow of customers and challenges.
  
     
   PROVE YOURSELF TO MASTER MIXOLOGISTS 
  Experience the challenges of different regions and prove yourself to the master mixologists of those lands.
  
   
    
   BUT MOST IMPORTANTLY DON'T FORGET TO HAVE FUN!

localized_description.text:
无论是线上联机还是本地合作，你都能与最多3名好友一起经营这家《小动物餐吧》。作为餐吧老板，你们需要分工合作，一人接引顾客，一人调配饮品，另一人则负责安抚顾客的情绪……或是全员手忙脚乱，笑料不断！你们的目标是将餐吧打造成为当地最热门的“聚会圣地”，吸引源源不断的动物顾客光临！
  
    
   
  每位顾客都拥有独特的个性和座位偏好。例如，暴躁的老虎一生气就会掀翻桌子、憨厚的野牛讨厌上餐太慢、调皮的臭鼬可能会突然“释放气体”让周围的人晕倒！小心，千万别把大灰狼的座位安排在兔子旁边，这可能会让局面变的棘手！当然，你也可以在事情失控前采用一些“物理手段”（比如拿起木板，将闹事的顾客赶出去！），要知道，平衡好顾客之间的关系，才能将餐吧更好的经营下去。   
  
    
   
  从饮品机的位置到餐吧的整体风格，一切由你掌控！每当营业结束，你都可以用赚取的钱购买新设备、调整布局以满足不同顾客的需求。随着餐吧规模的不断扩大，你将解锁更多设施，还可以前往全新的地区，结识更多性格各异的顾客，迎接新的挑战，考验你餐吧管理技巧的时刻到了。你还能一如既往地征服这些新顾客吗？
  
   
   
   
   但别忘了，享受其中的乐趣才是最重要的！

無論是線上聯機還是本地合作，你都能與最多3名好友一起經營這家《小動物餐吧》。作為餐吧老闆，你們需要分工合作，一人接引顧客，一人調配飲品，另一人則負責安撫顧客的情緒……或是全員手忙腳亂，笑料不斷！你們的目標是將餐吧打造成為當地最熱門的“聚會聖地”，吸引源源不斷的動物顧客光臨！
   
   
   
  每位顧客都擁有獨特的個性和座位偏好。例如，暴躁的老虎一生氣就會掀翻桌子、憨厚的野牛討厭上餐太慢、調皮的臭鼬可能會突然“釋放氣體”讓周圍的人暈倒！小心，千萬別把大灰狼的座位安排在兔子旁邊，這可能會讓局面變的棘手！當然，你也可以在事情失控前採用一些“物理手段”（比如拿起木板，將鬧事的顧客趕出去！），要知道，平衡好顧客之間的關係，才能將餐吧更好的經營下去。   
  
    
   
  從飲品機的位置到餐吧的整體風格，一切由你掌控！每當營業結束，你都可以用賺取的錢購買新設備、調整布局以滿足不同顧客的需求。隨著餐吧規模的不斷擴大，你將解鎖更多設施，還可以前往全新的地區，結識更多性格各異的顧客，迎接新的挑戰，考驗你餐吧管理技巧的時刻到了。你還能一如既往地征服這些新顧客嗎？
  
   
   
   
   但別忘了，享受其中的樂趣才是最重要的！

PLAY WITH FRIENDS! 
  Play solo or with up to 4 friends in couch mode or online co-op mode, and turn your venue into the hottest spot in the region.
  
   
   
   
   SEAT AND SERVE 
  Greet customers at the door, choose their seats, and manage their satisfaction. If someone’s too much to handle, you can always give them the boot—literally!
  
     
   BE AWARE OF CUSTOMER TYPES 
  Your customers are animals with unique personalities and seating preferences. Be careful—seating a panda next to a tiger might not end well! 
   You better watch out for special customers, while some may involuntarily release gas and knock you out, others may try to knock you out with old methods.    
  
     
   ORGANIZE YOUR VENUE 
  Set up tables, juice machines, and even toilets wherever you like! Make purchases at the end of each day and strategize your layout to handle the flow of customers and challenges.
  
     
   PROVE YOURSELF TO MASTER MIXOLOGISTS 
  Experience the challenges of different regions and prove yourself to the master mixologists of those lands.
  
   
    
   BUT MOST IMPORTANTLY DON'T FORGET TO HAVE FUN!

¡JUEGA CON AMIGOS! 
  Juega en solitario o en un equipo con hasta 4 jugadores en modo local o cooperativo en línea y consigue que tu local sea el más concurrido de la región.
  
   
   
   
   SIENTA Y SIRVE A LOS CLIENTES 
  Recibe a los clientes en la entrada, elige sus asientos y déjalos satisfechos. Si alguno te da demasiados problemas, puedes patearle el culo, ¡literalmente!
  
     
   TEN EN CUENTA LOS TIPOS DE CLIENTES 
  Tus clientes son animales con personalidades y preferencias de asiento únicas. Por ejemplo, si sientas a un panda con un tigre, ¡la cosa podría acabar mal!
  Mantente alerta con los clientes especiales: algunos podrían soltar gases y noquearte, mientras que otros podrían intentar hacerlo con métodos más tradicionales.   
  
     
   ORGANIZA TU LOCAL 
  ¡Coloca mesas, máquinas de zumos e incluso aseos donde más te guste! Compra objetos al final de cada día y colócalos estratégicamente para afrontar la afluencia de clientes y otros desafíos.
  
     
   DEMUESTRA QUE DOMINAS LA MIXOLOGÍA 
  Prueba los retos de cada región y conviértete en un referente entre los grandes mixólogos.
  
   
    
   PERO LO MÁS IMPORTANTE: ¡DIVIÉRTETE POR ENCIMA DE TODO!

JOUEZ AVEC VOS AMIS ! 
  Jouez en solo ou en équipe jusqu'à 4 joueurs, en mode local ou en ligne, et faites de votre établissement l'endroit le plus branché du coin.
  
   
   
   
   PLACEZ VOS CLIENTS ET SERVEZ-LES 
  Accueillez vos clients, placez-les et satisfaites leurs demandes. Si l'un d'entre eux est trop exigeant, mettez-le à la porte !
  
     
   FAITES ATTENTION AUX PROFILS DE VOS CLIENTS 
  Vos clients sont des animaux aux personnalités uniques, et chacun a ses préférences. Placer un panda à côté d'un tigre pourrait mal finir !
  Méfiez-vous des clients particuliers : certains pourraient vous assommer accidentellement en lâchant des gaz, d'autres en usant de méthodes plus classiques.   
  
     
   AMÉNAGEZ VOTRE SALLE 
  Installez des tables, des machines à jus et même des toilettes ! Faites vos achats à la fin de chaque journée et adaptez votre agencement à l'afflux de clients et aux défis à relever.
  
     
   FAITES VOS PREUVES AUPRÈS DES MEILLEURS MIXOLOGUES 
  Relevez les défis des différentes régions et faites vos preuves auprès des meilleurs mixologues.
  
   
    
   ET SURTOUT, AMUSEZ-VOUS !

SPIELE MIT FREUNDEN! 
  Spiele alleine oder in einem Team aus bis zu 4 Spielern im Couch-Modus oder Online-Koop-Modus und verwandle dein Lokal in die angesagteste Location der Region.
  
   
   
   
   PLATZ ZUWEISEN UND BEDIENEN 
  Begrüße die Gäste an der Tür, weise ihnen Plätze an den Tischen zu und stell sie zufrieden. Falls dir bestimmte Gäste über den Kopf wachsen, kannst du sie einfach mit einem Tritt hinausbefördern!
  
     
   ACHTE AUF DIE ART DER GÄSTE 
  Bei deinen Gästen handelt es sich um Tiere mit einzigartigen Charaktereigenschaften und Sitzvorlieben. Sei vorsichtig: Wenn du einen Panda mit einem Tiger an einen Tisch setzt, könnte das böse enden!
  Und behalte stets deine Spezialgäste im Auge: Einige von ihnen könnten dich unfreiwillig mit übelriechenden Gasen außer Gefecht setzen, während andere dafür vielleicht auf althergebrachte Methoden zurückgreifen werden.   
  
     
   RICHTE DEIN LOKAL EIN 
  Platziere Tische, Saftmaschinen und sogar Klos, wo immer du willst! Tätige am Ende eines jeden Tages Einkäufe, um deine Ausstattung strategisch zu erweitern, damit du den Ansturm der Gäste und andere Herausforderungen bewältigen kannst.
  
     
   BEWEISE MEISTERHAFTEN BARKEEPERN DEIN KÖNNEN 
  Stell dich den Herausforderungen verschiedener Regionen und zeig den meisterhaften Barkeepern dort, was du draufhast.
  
   
    
   ABER AM WICHTIGSTEN: HAB EINE MENGE SPASS!

PLAY WITH FRIENDS! 
  Play solo or with up to 4 friends in couch mode or online co-op mode, and turn your venue into the hottest spot in the region.
  
   
   
   
   SEAT AND SERVE 
  Greet customers at the door, choose their seats, and manage their satisfaction. If someone’s too much to handle, you can always give them the boot—literally!
  
     
   BE AWARE OF CUSTOMER TYPES 
  Your customers are animals with unique personalities and seating preferences. Be careful—seating a panda next to a tiger might not end well! 
   You better watch out for special customers, while some may involuntarily release gas and knock you out, others may try to knock you out with old methods.    
  
     
   ORGANIZE YOUR VENUE 
  Set up tables, juice machines, and even toilets wherever you like! Make purchases at the end of each day and strategize your layout to handle the flow of customers and challenges.
  
     
   PROVE YOURSELF TO MASTER MIXOLOGISTS 
  Experience the challenges of different regions and prove yourself to the master mixologists of those lands.
  
   
    
   BUT MOST IMPORTANTLY DON'T FORGET TO HAVE FUN!

オンラインやローカルでの協力プレイが可能で、最大3人の友達と一緒に『Party Club』を経営できます。店主として、役割を分担してお客様を迎え、ドリンクを作り、他のスタッフは顧客を落ち着かせる役割を担います…または、全員がバタバタして笑いが絶えない状態に！あなたの目標は、レストランを「地元の人気スポット」にすることです。動物たちが絶え間なく訪れるようにしましょう！
  
    
   
  各顧客は独自の性格と座席の好みを持っています。例えば、怒りっぽい虎は一度怒るとテーブルをひっくり返し、心優しい野牛は遅い料理が嫌い、いたずら好きなスカンクは突然「ガス」を放って周囲の人を気絶させるかも！大きな灰色狼の座席をウサギの隣に配置すると、危険な状況に発展するかもしれません！もちろん、事態が制御不能になる前に「物理的手段」を取ることもできます（例えば、木の板を使って騒いでいる客を追い出す！）。お客様同士の関係をうまく調整することが、レストランをうまく運営する鍵です。   
  
    
   
  ドリンクマシンの位置からレストラン全体のデザインまで、すべてあなたの手の中！営業が終わるたびに、稼いだお金で新しい設備を購入し、レイアウトを変更して、様々な顧客のニーズに応じましょう。レストランの規模が大きくなるにつれて、さらに多くの設備がアンロックされ、新たなエリアにも進出し、個性豊かな顧客に出会い、新たな挑戦が待っています。あなたの運営スキルが試される時が来ました。新しい顧客たちを征服できるでしょうか？
  
    
   
   でも、何よりも大切なのは楽しむことを忘れないことです！

PLAY WITH FRIENDS! 
  Play solo or with up to 4 friends in couch mode or online co-op mode, and turn your venue into the hottest spot in the region.
  
   
   
   
   SEAT AND SERVE 
  Greet customers at the door, choose their seats, and manage their satisfaction. If someone’s too much to handle, you can always give them the boot—literally!
  
     
   BE AWARE OF CUSTOMER TYPES 
  Your customers are animals with unique personalities and seating preferences. Be careful—seating a panda next to a tiger might not end well! 
   You better watch out for special customers, while some may involuntarily release gas and knock you out, others may try to knock you out with old methods.    
  
     
   ORGANIZE YOUR VENUE 
  Set up tables, juice machines, and even toilets wherever you like! Make purchases at the end of each day and strategize your layout to handle the flow of customers and challenges.
  
     
   PROVE YOURSELF TO MASTER MIXOLOGISTS 
  Experience the challenges of different regions and prove yourself to the master mixologists of those lands.
  
   
    
   BUT MOST IMPORTANTLY DON'T FORGET TO HAVE FUN!

PLAY WITH FRIENDS! 
  Play solo or with up to 4 friends in couch mode or online co-op mode, and turn your venue into the hottest spot in the region.
  
   
   
   
   SEAT AND SERVE 
  Greet customers at the door, choose their seats, and manage their satisfaction. If someone’s too much to handle, you can always give them the boot—literally!
  
     
   BE AWARE OF CUSTOMER TYPES 
  Your customers are animals with unique personalities and seating preferences. Be careful—seating a panda next to a tiger might not end well! 
   You better watch out for special customers, while some may involuntarily release gas and knock you out, others may try to knock you out with old methods.    
  
     
   ORGANIZE YOUR VENUE 
  Set up tables, juice machines, and even toilets wherever you like! Make purchases at the end of each day and strategize your layout to handle the flow of customers and challenges.
  
     
   PROVE YOURSELF TO MASTER MIXOLOGISTS 
  Experience the challenges of different regions and prove yourself to the master mixologists of those lands.
  
   
    
   BUT MOST IMPORTANTLY DON'T FORGET TO HAVE FUN!

GIOCA CON GLI AMICI! 
  Gioca in solitaria o in una squadra con un massimo di 4 giocatori nelle modalità locale e cooperativa online, e trasforma il tuo locale nel luogo più in voga della regione.
  
   
   
   
   ACCOGLI E SERVI DA BERE 
  Accogli i clienti alla porta, scegli dove farli accomodare e cerca di soddisfarli. Se qualcuno è troppo difficile da accontentare, puoi sempre buttarlo fuori... letteralmente!
  
     
   FAI ATTENZIONE AI VARI TIPI DI CLIENTE 
  I tuoi clienti sono animali dalle personalità uniche e gusti specifici per i posti a sedere. Fai attenzione: mettere un panda vicino a una tigre potrebbe essere una pessima idea!
  Occhio ai clienti speciali: c'è chi ti stende con una flatulenza involontaria e chi usa metodi più... vecchia scuola!   
  
     
   ORGANIZZA IL TUO LOCALE 
  Sistema i tavoli, gli spillatori di succhi e perfino le lettiere ovunque tu voglia! Fai acquisti a ogni fine giornata e organizza il tuo spazio per gestire ondate di clienti e superare ogni sfida!
  
     
   METTI ALLA PROVA LE TUE ABILITÀ DAVANTI AI GRANDI BARMAN 
  Divertiti con le sfide che troverai nelle diverse regioni e affronta i maestri barman di quei luoghi per dimostrargli chi comanda al bancone!
  
   
    
   MA SOPRATTUTTO NON DIMENTICARE DI DIVERTIRTI!

game.title: PEAK
game.description:
PEAK is a co-op climbing game where the slightest mistake can spell your doom. Either solo or as a group of lost nature scouts, your only hope of rescue from a mysterious island is to scale the mountain at its center. Do you have what it takes to reach the PEAK?
     
WORK TOGETHER 
Need a Hand? You’ll need to rely on your friends to have any hope of scaling the mountain, which changes every single day. Help each other up ledges, or place ropes and climbing spikes to make the way easier for those who come after.
  
CLIMB 
The Mountain Takes no Prisoners! Climb through 4 biomes on your way to the PEAK, each with their own life-threatening obstacles. You’ll need to scavenge for questionable food to survive, and manage your injuries carefully — every setback limits your stamina, making it harder to climb.
  
SURVIVE 
Prepare For the Worst: Discover a variety of helpful survival items, from energy drinks to climbing spikes to the mysterious Anti-Rope. You’ve got no hope of making it to the PEAK unless you press every advantage given to you.
  
A NEW ISLAND EACH DAY 
The game's map rotates out every 24 hours! Try out the new layout each day, or give the same island multiple attempts in a day until you conquer it.
  
EARN BADGES 
A Well-Seasoned Scout: Show off your survival prowess with dozens of badges to earn and cosmetics to unlock.
  
CLIMBING IS BETTER WITH FRIENDS 
Multiplayer in PEAK is friends-only - invite up to three other scouts through Steam to climb together, or face the mountain alone if you're  really  brave!

FEATURES    
• Climb with a total of 4 friends
• Communicate through proximity chat       
• 4 different biomes to ascend through
• A bunch of questionable foods
• Lots of different climbing items
• Campfires and marshmallows   
• Character customization    
• Online co-op and offline single player    
• Ghosts

localized_description.text:
PEAK is a co-op climbing game where the slightest mistake can spell your doom. Either solo or as a group of lost nature scouts, your only hope of rescue from a mysterious island is to scale the mountain at its center. Do you have what it takes to reach the PEAK?
     
WORK TOGETHER 
Need a Hand? You’ll need to rely on your friends to have any hope of scaling the mountain, which changes every single day. Help each other up ledges, or place ropes and climbing spikes to make the way easier for those who come after.
  
CLIMB 
The Mountain Takes no Prisoners! Climb through 4 biomes on your way to the PEAK, each with their own life-threatening obstacles. You’ll need to scavenge for questionable food to survive, and manage your injuries carefully — every setback limits your stamina, making it harder to climb.
  
SURVIVE 
Prepare For the Worst: Discover a variety of helpful survival items, from energy drinks to climbing spikes to the mysterious Anti-Rope. You’ve got no hope of making it to the PEAK unless you press every advantage given to you.
  
A NEW ISLAND EACH DAY 
The game's map rotates out every 24 hours! Try out the new layout each day, or give the same island multiple attempts in a day until you conquer it.
  
EARN BADGES 
A Well-Seasoned Scout: Show off your survival prowess with dozens of badges to earn and cosmetics to unlock.
  
CLIMBING IS BETTER WITH FRIENDS 
Multiplayer in PEAK is friends-only - invite up to three other scouts through Steam to climb together, or face the mountain alone if you're  really  brave!

FEATURES    
• Climb with a total of 4 friends
• Communicate through proximity chat       
• 4 different biomes to ascend through
• A bunch of questionable foods
• Lots of different climbing items
• Campfires and marshmallows   
• Character customization    
• Online co-op and offline single player    
• Ghosts

game.title: Septerra Core
game.description:
At the very heart of Septerra lies the Core, a huge Biocomputer. Seven continents at different elevations, each with its own unique people and culture, orbit around the Core.
 According to an ancient prophecy, Septerra's continents will one day converge and join in orbit together on one level - this is the Legacy of Marduk, the Creator's son. The Chosen, fanatical believers in the supremacy of their own wisdom and technology, impatiently try to force the issue - causing a global catastrophe which threatens the lives of all Septerreans.
 
 Meanwhile, amongst the Junkers, a young woman named Maya gets caught up in the developing maelstrom and soon finds herself confronted by seemingly insurmountable problems. Without help she stands no chance of fulfilling the Prophesy before Septerra perishes. But whom can she trust in a world torn by war and treacherous intrigue - a world on the edge of the abyss?  FEATURES :   A fantasy role playing game with over 140 characters and a complex, multi-level world
   Intriguingly varied story-line
   Choose up to nine party members, each with a unique motivation, skills and background
   The strategic combat system combines the best of turn-based and real-time elements
   Explore over 200 locations with mysterious buildings, landscapes, danger and surprise at every turn
   The Adventure-style user interface gives you maximum interaction
   Hundreds of entertaining voices spoken by professional actors

Willkommen auf  Septerra , willkommen in einer Welt, in der die Naturgesetze scheinbar keine Geltung haben. Eine Welt, in der sieben konzentrische Weltschollen sieben einzigartige Gesellschaften beherbergen und in der die Biotechnologie ungeheure Ausmaße angenommen hat. Einst von einem sagenumwobenen Schöpfer erschaffen, wirken hier noch immer mächtige und unheimliche Kräfte. Uralte Legenden berichten, daß der Schöpfer es den Bewohnern Septerras in ferner Zukunft erlauben würde, seine Macht zu empfangen und die Welt vor ihrer Zerstörung zu retten.
 
 Maya, eine junge Frau, die auf den Schrotthaufen von Terra 2 lebt und nach Nützlichem sucht, wird in den Strudel der Ereignisse gerissen und muß sich dem Vermächtnis des Schöpfers stellen. Sie braucht dringend Hilfe! Doch wem soll sie vertrauen in einer Welt am Rande des Abgrunds ...
 
 Und da ist Led, die Tochter des Militärstrategen Campbell, die besonders gerne mit dem riesigen Schraubenschlüssel als Waffe in den Kampf zieht, den ihr der Vater verboten hat ...  FEATURES    Atmosphärisches Rollenspiel mit über 140 Charakteren
   Zeitgesteuertes Kampfsystem kombiniert Echtzeit und rundenbasierten Elementen
   Vielschichtige und dichte Story mit über 200 Locations voller Wunder und Gefahren
   Neun Partymitglieder mit individueller Persönlichkeit und Motivation
   Rendergrafik im japanischen Manga-Stil
   Benutzerfreundliches Interface im Adventure-Style
   Bis zu 120 eigene Zauberspruchkombinationen

game.title: The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings Enhanced Edition
game.description:
Check out other games from CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Check out other games from CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  About the Game The second installment in the RPG saga about professional monster slayer Geralt of Rivia, The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings spins a mature, thought-provoking tale to produce one of the most elaborate and unique role-playing games ever released on PC. 
 
 A time of untold chaos has come. Mighty forces clash behind the scenes in a struggle for power and influence. The Northern Kingdoms mobilize for war. But armies on the march are not enough to stop a bloody conspiracy... KEY FEATURES  IMMERSIVE, MATURE, NON-LINEAR STORY 
   Dive into an immense, emotionally-charged, non-linear story set in a fantasy world unlike any other. 
   Embark on a complex, expansive adventure in which every decision may lead to dire consequences. 
   Engage in over 40 hours of narrative-driven gameplay, featuring 4 different beginnings and 16 different endings.    
 
  SPECTACULAR, BRUTAL, TACTICAL COMBAT 
   Fight using a combat system that uniquely fuses dynamic action with well-developed RPG mechanics.
   Use an array of unique witcher weapons, featuring both melee and ranged options.
   Prepare for battle using a wide array of tactical options: craft potions, set traps and baits, cast magic and sneak up on your foes.    
 
  REALISTIC, VAST, CONSISTENT GAME WORLD 
   Discover a deep, rich game world where ominous events shape the lives of entire populations while bloodthirsty monsters rage about. 
   Explore numerous, varied locations: from vibrant trading posts, to bustling mining towns, to mighty castles and fortresses; and discover the stories they have to tell and dark secrets they hide.   
 
  CUTTING-EDGE TECHNOLOGY 
   Experience a believable living and breathing world, featuring beautiful graphics and utilizing sophisticated in-game mechanics made possible thanks to CD PROJEKT RED in-house technology, REDengine.    ABOUT THE WITCHER 2 ENHANCED EDITION The Enhanced Edition features lots of new and exciting content.
   Additional hours of gameplay: New adventures set in previously unseen locations, expanding the story and introducing new characters, mysteries and monsters.
   New game introduction and cinematics: All new animations and cutscenes, including a new pre-rendered cinematic intro directed by BAFTA Award winner and Academy Award nominee Tomasz Bagiński.
   All DLCs and improvements introduced in the 2.0 version of the game, including:
   Arena Mode — an arcade mode that allows players to fight against endless waves of enemies and test their combat skills.
   A new, extensive tutorial system, gradually and smoothly immersing players in the game world and Geralt’s adventures.
   Dark Mode — a difficulty level designed for hardcore players, with unique dark-themed items. At this difficulty level, even greater emphasis is placed on battle preparation, defensive maneuvers and opportunistic attacking.    
 The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition comes with these bonus items: 
   Official soundtrack in MP3 format
   A map of the game's world
   A quest handbook for both novice and experienced role-playing fans
   Game manual
   “Reasons of State” digital comic book.

localized_description.text:
Check out other games from CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Check out other games from CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  关于游戏 以专业怪物杀手利维亚的杰洛特为主人公，角色扮演传奇的第二部《巫师 2：国王刺客》通过发人深省的成熟剧情，营造出电脑上有史以来最为精巧独特的角色扮演游戏。
 
 纷乱的时代已经到来。各路强大的势力在幕后勾心斗角，争权夺势。为了备战，北方诸国纷纷动员。然而挺进的大军却难以抵挡血腥的阴谋…… 游戏特色  引人入胜的成人化非线性剧情 
   身临其境步入前所未有的奇幻世界，体验打动人心的非线性剧情。
   迈上错落交织的磅礴冒险之旅，您做出的每一个决定都可能导致严重的后果。
   投身超过 40 小时的叙事驱动游戏内容，体验 4 种不同的开局，16 个迥异的结尾。   
 
  充斥着暴力美学的战术战斗 
   游戏所使用的战斗系统将成熟的角色扮演机制和动态动作别出心裁地结合在一起。
   使用一系列独特的猎魔人武器，远交近攻，应有尽有。
   琳琅满目的战术选择：制作魔药、设置陷阱和诱饵、施放魔法，乃至于对敌人发动偷袭。   
 
  逼真、广袤、风格一致的游戏世界 
   体验一个丰富多彩的深刻游戏世界。在这里，各种不详的事件勾勒出了嗜血怪物蠢蠢欲动的生活环境。
   探索数不胜数的各种场景，从熙熙攘攘的商栈，热火朝天的矿业城镇，到宏伟的城堡和要塞，挖掘其中蕴藏的故事和不可见人的秘密。   
 
  尖端的技术 
   在栩栩如生的世界中体验到美轮美奂的画面效果，并且通过 CD PROJEKT RED 自创技术 REDengine 的帮助，让复杂的游戏机制成为可能。   关于《巫师 2：加强版》 加强版囊括了大量激动人心的新内容。
   更多游戏时长：在原作中未曾探访的地点展开新的冒险，进一步展开故事情节，遭遇新的人物、谜团和怪物。
   新的游戏介绍和过场动画：动画和过场全部重新制作，包括一段由 BAFTA 获奖得主和荣获学院奖提名的托马斯·巴金斯基执导的全新预渲染过场动画。
   收录 2.0 版本游戏的所有 DLC 和改进内容，包括：
   竞技场模式：让玩家可以面对前赴后继的无尽敌人，考验自身战斗技巧的街机模式。
   全新的增强教学系统，引领玩家逐步迈进游戏世界，融入杰洛特的冒险之中。
   黑暗模式：专为硬派玩家设计的难度等级，并且包含以黑暗为主题的独有物品。在这个难度下，对战前准备、防御技巧以及把握攻击时机的要求会变得更高。    
 《巫师 2：加强版》内含以下特典内容：
   MP3 格式的官方原声
   游戏世界地图
   角色扮演游戏的新手还是行家都适用的任务手册
   游戏指南
   《国之理性》数码漫画。

看看 CD PROJEKT RED 其他作品  
 
 
 
  看看 CD PROJEKT RED 其他作品  
 
 
 
  關於此遊戲 《巫師 2：王國刺客》是系列第二部作品，這款角色扮演遊戲圍繞著「利維亞的傑洛特」這名屠魔專家展開，而遊戲劇情讓人陷入沉思及獨特的程度更勝至今在 PC 上推出的所有角色扮演遊戲。
 
 兵荒馬亂的日子已然來臨。多方勢力暗中較勁，只為擁權並成為霸主。北方諸國已進入備戰狀態，但再多精良的軍隊也阻止不了一樁即將掀起腥風血雨的奸計…… 遊戲特色  充滿張力、讓人反覆思量的非單一主線劇情 
   置身絕無僅有的奇幻世界，並沉浸於龐大且扣人心弦的非單一主線故事之中。
   啟程展開錯綜複雜又壯闊的冒險，而途中所有抉擇都將帶來相對應的後果。
   超過四十個小時的遊玩時間，這款劇情導向的遊戲有四種開頭和十六種結局等著玩家體驗。   
 
  精彩、凶殘且兼具戰略性的戰鬥 
   以獨特的動態動作戰鬥系統搭配絕佳的角色扮演機能進行對戰。
   手持各式各樣近戰或遠程的狩魔獵人武器大展身手。
   活用戰術準備交戰：打造藥水、放置陷阱或誘餌、使用魔法或偷襲敵人。   
 
  一貫寫實又遼闊的遊戲世界 
   不祥事件和嗜血怪物壓境，難以捉摸且細膩的遊戲世界等著玩家探索。
   尋訪世界各地：無論是驛站、熱鬧的礦業城鎮，或宏偉的城堡和要塞，每個地方都藏著故事和不為人知的祕密。   
 
  頂尖技術 
   CD PROJEKT RED 獨有的 REDengine 遊戲引擎帶來瑰麗的畫面及精細的遊戲機制，成就出一個栩栩如生的世界。   關於《巫師 2 強化版》 《強化版》收錄多項全新的精彩內容。
   追加遊玩時間：玩家將於全新的地點與新角色、謎團和怪物交手，並展開嶄新的冒險。
   全新片頭動畫及劇情場景：除了大量全新製作的動畫和劇情場景，新的片頭動畫更由英國電影和電視藝術學院獎項得主及奧斯卡金像獎入圍者 Tomasz Bagiński 打造。
   收錄遊戲 2.0 版所有追加內容及提升，包含：
   競技場模式：對抗無止盡來襲的敵人，測試自身對戰技巧的大型機台模式。
   全新大型教學模式：讓玩家逐步孰悉傑洛特的世界和冒險。
   黑暗模式：為忠實玩家量身打造的高難度模式，其中包含特殊的黑暗物品。戰鬥前的準備、防禦技巧和戰術性攻擊都變得更為關鍵。    
 《巫師 2：強化版》收錄以下特典：
   MP3 格式的官方原聲帶
   遊戲世界地圖
   角色扮演遊戲新手和老手都能活用的任務指南
   遊戲操作手冊
   《Reasons of State》數位漫畫

  About the Game The second installment in the RPG saga about professional monster slayer Geralt of Rivia, The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings spins a mature, thought-provoking tale to produce one of the most elaborate and unique role-playing games ever released on PC. 
 
 A time of untold chaos has come. Mighty forces clash behind the scenes in a struggle for power and influence. The Northern Kingdoms mobilize for war. But armies on the march are not enough to stop a bloody conspiracy... KEY FEATURES  IMMERSIVE, MATURE, NON-LINEAR STORY 
   Dive into an immense, emotionally-charged, non-linear story set in a fantasy world unlike any other. 
   Embark on a complex, expansive adventure in which every decision may lead to dire consequences. 
   Engage in over 40 hours of narrative-driven gameplay, featuring 4 different beginnings and 16 different endings.    
 
  SPECTACULAR, BRUTAL, TACTICAL COMBAT 
   Fight using a combat system that uniquely fuses dynamic action with well-developed RPG mechanics.
   Use an array of unique witcher weapons, featuring both melee and ranged options.
   Prepare for battle using a wide array of tactical options: craft potions, set traps and baits, cast magic and sneak up on your foes.    
 
  REALISTIC, VAST, CONSISTENT GAME WORLD 
   Discover a deep, rich game world where ominous events shape the lives of entire populations while bloodthirsty monsters rage about. 
   Explore numerous, varied locations: from vibrant trading posts, to bustling mining towns, to mighty castles and fortresses; and discover the stories they have to tell and dark secrets they hide.   
 
  CUTTING-EDGE TECHNOLOGY 
   Experience a believable living and breathing world, featuring beautiful graphics and utilizing sophisticated in-game mechanics made possible thanks to CD PROJEKT RED in-house technology, REDengine.    ABOUT THE WITCHER 2 ENHANCED EDITION The Enhanced Edition features lots of new and exciting content.
   Additional hours of gameplay: New adventures set in previously unseen locations, expanding the story and introducing new characters, mysteries and monsters.
   New game introduction and cinematics: All new animations and cutscenes, including a new pre-rendered cinematic intro directed by BAFTA Award winner and Academy Award nominee Tomasz Bagiński.
   All DLCs and improvements introduced in the 2.0 version of the game, including:
   Arena Mode — an arcade mode that allows players to fight against endless waves of enemies and test their combat skills.
   A new, extensive tutorial system, gradually and smoothly immersing players in the game world and Geralt’s adventures.
   Dark Mode — a difficulty level designed for hardcore players, with unique dark-themed items. At this difficulty level, even greater emphasis is placed on battle preparation, defensive maneuvers and opportunistic attacking.    
 The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition comes with these bonus items: 
   Official soundtrack in MP3 format
   A map of the game's world
   A quest handbook for both novice and experienced role-playing fans
   Game manual
   “Reasons of State” digital comic book.

  Acerca del juego La segunda entrega de la saga RPG del cazador de monstruos profesional Geralt de Rivia, The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings, narra una historia madura que te hará reflexionar, para producir uno de los juegos de rol más elaborados y singulares jamás publicados en PC.
 
 Ha llegado una época de caos sin precedentes. Fuerzas poderosas se enfrentan entre bastidores en una lucha por el poder y la influencia. Los Reinos del Norte se movilizan para la guerra. Pero los ejércitos desplegados no son suficientes para detener una sanguinaria conspiración... CARACTERÍSTICAS PRINCIPALES  UNA HISTORIA NO LINEAL, MADURA E INMERSIVA 
   Sumérgete una enorme historia no lineal repleta de emociones y ambientada en un mundo de fantasía sin igual.
   Embárcate en una aventura compleja y extensa en la que cada decisión puede provocar consecuencias nefastas.
   Disfruta de más de 40 horas de juego basado en la narrativa, con 4 comienzos distintos y 16 finales diferentes.   
 
  COMBATE TÁCTICO ESPECTACULAR Y BRUTAL 
   Lucha usando un sistema de combate que combina como ninguno la acción dinámica con las mecánicas plenamente desarrolladas de un RPG.
   Utiliza una gran variedad de armas de brujo, entre las que se incluyen opciones para combate cuerpo a cuerpo y a distancia.
   Prepárate para la batalla usando un gran abanico de opciones tácticas: elaborar pociones, tender trampas y señuelos, lanzar hechizos mágicos y acercarte sigilosamente a los enemigos.   
 
  UN MUNDO DE JUEGO INMENSO, CONSISTENTE Y REALISTA 
   Descubre un mundo de juego enorme y rico, donde los sucesos siniestros determinan las vidas de poblaciones enteras y los monstruos sedientos de sangre arrasan todo a su paso.
   Explora numerosos y variados lugares: desde bulliciosos puestos comerciales, pasando por ajetreadas ciudades mineras, hasta imponentes castillos y fortalezas; y descubre las historias que tienen que contarte y los secretos que ocultan.   
 
  TECNOLOGÍA INNOVADORA 
   Experimenta un mundo vivo, que incluye preciosos gráficos y utiliza mecánicas de juego sofisticadas, que han sido posibles gracias a REDengine, la tecnología propia de CD PROJEKT RED.   ACERCA DE THE WITCHER 2 ENHANCED EDITION La Enhanced Edition incluye montones de contenidos nuevos y emocionantes.
   Horas adicionales de juego: nuevas aventuras ambientadas en lugares nunca antes vistos, que amplían la historia y dan a conocer a nuevos personajes, misterios y monstruos.
   Introducción y cinemáticas del juego nuevas: animaciones y secuencias totalmente nuevas, incluida una nueva cinemática prerrenderizada por el ganador del BAFTA y nominado a un premio de la Academia Tomasz Bagiński.
   Todos los DLC y mejoras introducidos en la versión 2.0 del juego, incluyendo:
   Modo Arena — un modo arcade que permite a los jugadores luchar contra oleadas interminables de enemigos y poner a prueba sus habilidades de combate.
   Un nuevo y extenso sistema de tutoriales que sumerge de forma gradual y fluida a los jugadores en el mundo del juego y las aventuras de Geralt.
   Modo Oscuro — un nivel de dificultad diseñado para los jugadores expertos, con objetos exclusivos de temática siniestra. En este nivel de dificultad se pone un mayor énfasis en la preparación de la batalla, las maniobras defensivas y los ataques oportunistas.    
 The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition incluye los siguientes artículos adicionales:
   Banda sonora oficial en formato MP3
   Un mapa del mundo del juego
   Una guía de misiones para roleros tanto novatos como veteranos
   Manual del juego
   Cómic digital «Reasons of State» (Razones de estado).

  Découvrez d'autres jeux de CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  À propos du jeu Deuxième opus de la série de jeux de rôles sur le tueur de monstres professionnel Geralt de Riv, The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings propose une histoire adulte, amenant à réfléchir, qui en a fait un des jeux de rôles les plus uniques et sophistiqués jamais sortis sur PC.
 
 Une époque d'indescriptible chaos s'ouvre. Dans l'ombre, des forces puissantes se disputent pouvoir et influence. Les royaumes du Nord se mobilisent pour la guerre. Mais les armées en marche ne suffiront pas à arrêter le complot sanglant… CARACTÉRISTIQUES  SCÉNARIO ADULTE ET CAPTIVANT NON LINÉAIRE 
   Plongez dans l'immense histoire non linéaire et pleine d'émotions qui se déroule dans un monde fantastique à nul autre pareil.
   Lancez-vous dans une grande aventure complexe, où chaque décision peut avoir de lourdes conséquences.
   Laissez-vous embarquer dans plus de 40 heures de jeu scénarisé, proposant 4 introductions et 16 fins différentes.   
 
  COMBAT TACTIQUE, SPECTACULAIRE ET BRUTAL 
   Combattez grâce à un système de combat mêlant de façon unique une action dynamique et des mécaniques de jeux de rôles habilement développées.
   Utilisez un éventail d'armes de sorceleur uniques, adaptées pour le combat au corps à corps ou à distance.
   Préparez-vous au combat grâce aux nombreuses possibilités tactiques : préparez des potions, posez de pièges et des appâts, lancez des sorts et faufilez-vous derrière vos ennemis.   
 
  VASTE MONDE DE JEU RÉALISTE ET COHÉRENT 
   Découvrez un monde de jeu riche et profond, où des événements horribles façonnent la vie de populations entières tandis que des monstres sanguinaires se déchaînent.
   Explorez des lieux aussi nombreux que variés, allant des comptoirs commerciaux animés jusqu'aux villes minières agitées, en passant par les imposants châteaux et forteresses, et découvrez leur histoire et leurs sombres secrets.   
 
  TECHNOLOGIE DE POINTE 
   Immergez-vous dans un monde crédible et plein de vie, offrant de splendides graphismes et utilisant des mécaniques de jeu sophistiquées rendues possibles par le REDengine, le moteur maison de CD PROJEKT RED.   À PROPOS DE THE WITCHER 2 ENHANCED EDITION L'Enhanced Edition propose un tas de nouveaux contenus passionnants.
   Plusieurs heures de jeu additionnelles : de nouvelles aventures prenant place dans des lieux inédits, prolongeant l'histoire et introduisant de nouveaux personnages, mystères et monstres.
   Nouvelle introduction du jeu et nouvelles cinématiques : nouvelles animations et cinématiques, dont une nouvelle cinématique d'introduction précalculée, réalisée par Tomasz Bagiński, primé par la BAFTA et nominé aux Oscars.
   Tous les contenus téléchargeables et améliorations apportés par la version 2.0 du jeu, incluant :
   Mode Arène : un mode arcade qui permet aux joueurs de combattre contre des vagues sans fin d'ennemis pour mettre à l'épreuve leurs talents de combattant.
   Un nouveau système de didacticiel étendu permettant aux joueurs de s'immerger en douceur dans l'univers du jeu et dans les aventures de Geralt.
   Mode Ténèbres : un niveau de difficulté conçu pour les joueurs acharnés, avec des objets spécialement dédiés à ce mode. À ce niveau de difficulté, l'accent est porté sur la préparation au combat, les manœuvres défensives et les attaques opportunistes.    
 The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition contient les articles bonus suivants :
   Bande originale officielle au format MP3
   Carte du monde de jeu
   Manuel des quêtes pour les fans de jeux de rôles novices ou expérimentés
   Manuel de jeu
   Bande dessinée numérique "Reasons of State"

Entdecke noch weitere Spiele von CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Entdecke noch weitere Spiele von CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Infos zum Spiel Der zweite Teil der Rollenspiel-Saga um den professionellen Monsterschlächter Geralt von Riva, The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings, entwickelt eine reife, nachdenklich stimmende Geschichte als Grundlage eines der ausgefeiltesten und einzigartigsten Rollenspiele für PC aller Zeiten.
 
 Es herrschen Zeiten unbeschreiblichen Durcheinanders. Mächtige Kräfte verstricken sich hinter den Kulissen in Kämpfe um Macht und Einfluss. Die Nördlichen Königreiche rüsten sich zum Krieg. Doch Armeen im Feld richten gegen blutige Verschwörungen nichts aus ... HAUPT-FEATURES  PACKENDE, REIFE, NICHT-LINEARE STORY 
   Tauche in eine komplexe, emotional aufgeladene, nicht-lineare Story in einer unvergleichlichen Fantasy-Welt ein.
   In diesem komplexen, expansiven Abenteuer kann jede Entscheidung schwerwiegende Konsequenzen haben.
   Erlebe über 40 Stunden erzählungsbasiertes Gameplay mit 4 verschiedenen Anfängen und 16 verschiedenen Enden.   
 
  SPEKTAKULÄRES, BRUTALES TAKTISCHES KAMPFSYSTEM 
   Erlebe ein Kampfsystem, das dynamische Action auf einzigartige Weise mit sorgfältig entwickelten RPG-Mechaniken kombiniert.
   Setze zahlreiche Hexerwaffen mit Nah- und Fernkampfoptionen ein.
   Bereite dich mit einer großen Bandbreite taktischer Optionen auf den Kampf vor: Braue Tränke, lege Fallen und Köder aus, wirke Magie und pirsche dich an deine Gegner heran.   
 
  REALISTISCHE, WEITLÄUFIGE, KONSISTENTE SPIELWELT 
   In dieser lebendigen, komplexen Welt beeinflussen obskure Geschehnisse das Leben ganzer Völker, und blutrünstige Monster treiben ihr Unwesen.
   Erkunde zahllose vielfältige Orte – lebendige Handelsposten, belebte Bergbaustädte, mächtige Schlösser und Festungen – und entdecke ihre Geschichten und finsteren Geheimnisse.   
 
  ZUKUNFTSWEISENDE TECHNIK 
   Erlebe eine glaubwürdige Welt, die lebt und atmet, mit wunderschönen Grafiken und ausgefeilten Spielmechaniken auf Basis der hauseigenen REDengine von CD PROJEKT RED.   ÜBER THE WITCHER 2 ENHANCED EDITION Die Enhanced Edition bringt jede Menge neue aufregende Inhalte mit.
   Zusätzliche Spielstunden: Neue Abenteuer an unbekannten Orten warten, erweitern die Story und führen neue Charaktere, Mysterien und Monster ein.
   Neue Spieleinführung und Filmsequenzen: Brandneue Animationen und Videosequenzen, darunter ein neues vorgerendertes Film-Intro des Oscar-nominierten BAFTA-Preisträgers Tomasz Bagiński.
   Alle DLCs und Verbesserungen der Version 2.0 des Spiels, darunter:
   Arena-Modus – ein Arcade-Modus mit endlosen Gegnerwellen, in dem Spieler ihre Kampfkünste erproben können.
   Neues, umfassendes Tutorialsystem, mit dem Spieler allmählich und komfortabel in die Spielwelt und in Geralts Abenteuer eintauchen können.
   Dunkler Modus – eine Schwierigkeitsstufe für Hardcore-Spieler mit einzigartigen finsteren Gegenständen. Auf dieser Schwierigkeitsstufe kommt es noch stärker auf die richtige Kampfvorbereitung, auf Abwehrmanöver und opportunistische Angriffe an.    
 The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition bringt die folgenden Bonusgegenstände mit:
   Offizieller Soundtrack im MP3-Format
   Karte der Spielwelt
   Missionshandbuch für Neulinge und erfahrene Rollenspiel-Fans
   Spielhandbuch
   Digitales Comicbuch "Reasons of State"

CD PROJEKT REDの他のゲームをチェックしよう  
 
 
 
  CD PROJEKT REDの他のゲームをチェックしよう  
 
 
 
  ゲームについて モンスタースレイヤー、リヴィアのゲラルトが活躍するRPGサーガ第2弾『ウィッチャー2 王の暗殺者』では、示唆に富む重厚な物語を通してPCゲーム史上他に類を見ない精巧かつユニークなRPGを体験できる。
 
 知られざる混沌の時代が到来した。権力と支配をめぐる争いの裏では、強大な勢力同士が衝突を繰り返している。北方諸国は戦争の道へと突き進んだ。しかし兵の進軍をもってしても、血塗られた陰謀を止めることはできない… 特徴  高い没入感と自由度を備えた上質なストーリー 
   唯一無二のファンタジー世界を舞台にした、情感あふれる壮大な物語を自由に楽しもう。
   ひとつひとつの選択が大きな変化を生む、複雑かつ壮大な冒険が待っている。
   ストーリーを中心に据えた40時間以上ものゲームプレイには、4種類のはじまりと16種類の結末が存在する。   
 
  戦略性の高い大迫力の戦闘 
   本作はダイナミックなアクションと精巧なRPG要素が融合した、独特の戦闘システムを採用。
   豊富に用意された近接・遠隔を含むユニークなウィッチャーの武器を使いこなせ。
   霊薬のクラフト、罠や餌の設置、魔法の使用や奇襲など、様々な準備やアプローチで戦いに臨もう。   
 
  作り込まれた広大かつリアルなゲーム世界 
   深みのある豊かな世界に飛び込もう。そこでは人々が不穏な出来事の影で暮らし、血に飢えたモンスターたちが猛威を振るっている。
   活気あふれる交易所や鉱山の町、巨大な城や要塞など、変化に富む様々なロケーションが登場。各地で新たな物語と出会い、その裏に潜む真実を解き明かせ。   
 
  最先端の技術 
   CD PROJEKT RED独自開発のREDengineによって、美しいグラフィックと洗練されたゲームシステムが実現。活き活きとしたリアルな世界を体験しよう。   『The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition』について Enhanced Editionは魅力的な新コンテンツを多数収録。
   大ボリュームの追加コンテンツ:新たな冒険には、これまで行くことのできなったロケーションが登場。新キャラクターやモンスターと出会い、謎を解き明かしながら、さらなる物語を体験しよう。
   新たなイントロムービーとシネマティック:BAFTA賞受賞者、そしてアカデミー賞候補経験者のTomasz Bagińskiが監督したプリレンダリングの導入ムービーを含む、新たなアニメーショントカットシーンを追加。
   バージョン2.0で追加されている全てのDLCと改良点を収録:
   アリーナモード — 次々と押し寄せる敵の集団に立ち向かい、戦闘スキルを試すことができるアーケードスタイルのモード。
   新たに追加された詳細なチュートリアルシステム — ゲーム世界とゲラルトの冒険に段階を踏んでスムーズに慣れていくことができる。
   ダークモード — ハードコアプレイヤー向けの難易度オプション。ダークモード仕様の特別なアイテムが登場する。この難易度では戦闘前の準備、防御行動、隙をついた攻撃がより重要となる。    
 『The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition』には以下のボーナスアイテムが付属:
   公式サウンドトラック(MP3形式)
   ゲームワールドマップ
   初心者から上級者まで、ロールプレイングファンのためのクエストハンドブック

  About the Game The second installment in the RPG saga about professional monster slayer Geralt of Rivia, The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings spins a mature, thought-provoking tale to produce one of the most elaborate and unique role-playing games ever released on PC. 
 
 A time of untold chaos has come. Mighty forces clash behind the scenes in a struggle for power and influence. The Northern Kingdoms mobilize for war. But armies on the march are not enough to stop a bloody conspiracy... KEY FEATURES  IMMERSIVE, MATURE, NON-LINEAR STORY 
   Dive into an immense, emotionally-charged, non-linear story set in a fantasy world unlike any other. 
   Embark on a complex, expansive adventure in which every decision may lead to dire consequences. 
   Engage in over 40 hours of narrative-driven gameplay, featuring 4 different beginnings and 16 different endings.    
 
  SPECTACULAR, BRUTAL, TACTICAL COMBAT 
   Fight using a combat system that uniquely fuses dynamic action with well-developed RPG mechanics.
   Use an array of unique witcher weapons, featuring both melee and ranged options.
   Prepare for battle using a wide array of tactical options: craft potions, set traps and baits, cast magic and sneak up on your foes.    
 
  REALISTIC, VAST, CONSISTENT GAME WORLD 
   Discover a deep, rich game world where ominous events shape the lives of entire populations while bloodthirsty monsters rage about. 
   Explore numerous, varied locations: from vibrant trading posts, to bustling mining towns, to mighty castles and fortresses; and discover the stories they have to tell and dark secrets they hide.   
 
  CUTTING-EDGE TECHNOLOGY 
   Experience a believable living and breathing world, featuring beautiful graphics and utilizing sophisticated in-game mechanics made possible thanks to CD PROJEKT RED in-house technology, REDengine.    ABOUT THE WITCHER 2 ENHANCED EDITION The Enhanced Edition features lots of new and exciting content.
   Additional hours of gameplay: New adventures set in previously unseen locations, expanding the story and introducing new characters, mysteries and monsters.
   New game introduction and cinematics: All new animations and cutscenes, including a new pre-rendered cinematic intro directed by BAFTA Award winner and Academy Award nominee Tomasz Bagiński.
   All DLCs and improvements introduced in the 2.0 version of the game, including:
   Arena Mode — an arcade mode that allows players to fight against endless waves of enemies and test their combat skills.
   A new, extensive tutorial system, gradually and smoothly immersing players in the game world and Geralt’s adventures.
   Dark Mode — a difficulty level designed for hardcore players, with unique dark-themed items. At this difficulty level, even greater emphasis is placed on battle preparation, defensive maneuvers and opportunistic attacking.    
 The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition comes with these bonus items: 
   Official soundtrack in MP3 format
   A map of the game's world
   A quest handbook for both novice and experienced role-playing fans
   Game manual
   “Reasons of State” digital comic book.

This third-person dark fantasy Western RPG and sequel to The Witcher (2007), featuring multiple endings and branching narrative paths, follows the travels of Geralt of Rivia, witcher, who, after being falsely accused of regicide, sets out to clear his name and find the real killer, in a time of political turmoil and the brink of war between the imperialistic Nilfgaardian Empire and the Four Kingdoms.

The player is Geralt of Rivia, a professional monster slayer, a witcher. Entangled in the political turmoil that engulfed Temeria, Geralt helped quell the rebellion of the Order of the Flaming Rose. Soon after, he saved King Foltest’s life when the monarch was attacked by a witcher-like assassin. He continues to protect the king, serving as his bodyguard as Foltest strives to bring peace to his kingdom. The Order’s last bastions have yielded to the royal army, yet one more task remains - the Baroness La Valette announced her secession from the realm, and her fortress must be taken. A month after the attempted assassination, Foltest’s armies stand at the gates of La Valette Castle, preparing for a final assault. Still at Foltest’s side, Geralt is among them, unable to begin his personal quest to discover the mysterious assassin’s origin and identity.

  Acerca del juego La segunda entrega de la saga RPG del cazador de monstruos profesional Geralt de Rivia, The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings, narra una historia madura que te hará reflexionar, para producir uno de los juegos de rol más elaborados y singulares jamás publicados en PC.
 
 Ha llegado una época de caos sin precedentes. Fuerzas poderosas se enfrentan entre bastidores en una lucha por el poder y la influencia. Los Reinos del Norte se movilizan para la guerra. Pero los ejércitos desplegados no son suficientes para detener una sanguinaria conspiración... CARACTERÍSTICAS PRINCIPALES  UNA HISTORIA NO LINEAL, MADURA E INMERSIVA 
   Sumérgete una enorme historia no lineal repleta de emociones y ambientada en un mundo de fantasía sin igual.
   Embárcate en una aventura compleja y extensa en la que cada decisión puede provocar consecuencias nefastas.
   Disfruta de más de 40 horas de juego basado en la narrativa, con 4 comienzos distintos y 16 finales diferentes.        
 
  COMBATE TÁCTICO ESPECTACULAR Y BRUTAL 
   Lucha usando un sistema de combate que combina como ninguno la acción dinámica con las mecánicas plenamente desarrolladas de un RPG.
   Utiliza una gran variedad de armas de brujo, entre las que se incluyen opciones para combate cuerpo a cuerpo y a distancia.
   Prepárate para la batalla usando un gran abanico de opciones tácticas: elaborar pociones, tender trampas y señuelos, lanzar hechizos mágicos y acercarte sigilosamente a los enemigos.        
 
  UN MUNDO DE JUEGO INMENSO, CONSISTENTE Y REALISTA 
   Descubre un mundo de juego enorme y rico, donde los sucesos siniestros determinan las vidas de poblaciones enteras y los monstruos sedientos de sangre arrasan todo a su paso.
   Explora numerosos y variados lugares: desde bulliciosos puestos comerciales, pasando por ajetreadas ciudades mineras, hasta imponentes castillos y fortalezas; y descubre las historias que tienen que contarte y los secretos que ocultan.        
 
  TECNOLOGÍA INNOVADORA 
   Experimenta un mundo vivo, que incluye preciosos gráficos y utiliza mecánicas de juego sofisticadas, que han sido posibles gracias a REDengine, la tecnología propia de CD PROJEKT RED.   ACERCA DE THE WITCHER 2 ENHANCED EDITION La Enhanced Edition incluye montones de contenidos nuevos y emocionantes.
   Horas adicionales de juego: nuevas aventuras ambientadas en lugares nunca antes vistos, que amplían la historia y dan a conocer a nuevos personajes, misterios y monstruos.
   Introducción y cinemáticas del juego nuevas: animaciones y secuencias totalmente nuevas, incluida una nueva cinemática prerrenderizada por el ganador del BAFTA y nominado a un premio de la Academia Tomasz Bagiński.
   Todos los DLC y mejoras introducidos en la versión 2.0 del juego, incluyendo:
   Modo Arena — un modo arcade que permite a los jugadores luchar contra oleadas interminables de enemigos y poner a prueba sus habilidades de combate.
   Un nuevo y extenso sistema de tutoriales que sumerge de forma gradual y fluida a los jugadores en el mundo del juego y las aventuras de Geralt.
   Modo Oscuro — un nivel de dificultad diseñado para los jugadores expertos, con objetos exclusivos de temática siniestra. En este nivel de dificultad se pone un mayor énfasis en la preparación de la batalla, las maniobras defensivas y los ataques oportunistas.    
 The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition incluye los siguientes artículos adicionales:
   Banda sonora oficial en formato MP3
   Un mapa del mundo del juego
   Una guía de misiones para roleros tanto novatos como veteranos
   Manual del juego
   Cómic digital «Reasons of State» (Razones de estado).

Découvrez d'autres jeux de CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Découvrez d'autres jeux de CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  À propos du jeu Deuxième opus de la série de jeux de rôles sur le tueur de monstres professionnel Geralt de Riv, The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings propose une histoire adulte, amenant à réfléchir, qui en a fait un des jeux de rôles les plus uniques et sophistiqués jamais sortis sur PC.
 
 Une époque d'indescriptible chaos s'ouvre. Dans l'ombre, des forces puissantes se disputent pouvoir et influence. Les royaumes du Nord se mobilisent pour la guerre. Mais les armées en marche ne suffiront pas à arrêter le complot sanglant… CARACTÉRISTIQUES  SCÉNARIO ADULTE ET CAPTIVANT NON LINÉAIRE 
   Plongez dans l'immense histoire non linéaire et pleine d'émotions qui se déroule dans un monde fantastique à nul autre pareil.
   Lancez-vous dans une grande aventure complexe, où chaque décision peut avoir de lourdes conséquences.
   Laissez-vous embarquer dans plus de 40 heures de jeu scénarisé, proposant 4 introductions et 16 fins différentes.        
 
  COMBAT TACTIQUE, SPECTACULAIRE ET BRUTAL 
   Combattez grâce à un système de combat mêlant de façon unique une action dynamique et des mécaniques de jeux de rôles habilement développées.
   Utilisez un éventail d'armes de sorceleur uniques, adaptées pour le combat au corps à corps ou à distance.
   Préparez-vous au combat grâce aux nombreuses possibilités tactiques : préparez des potions, posez de pièges et des appâts, lancez des sorts et faufilez-vous derrière vos ennemis.        
 
  VASTE MONDE DE JEU RÉALISTE ET COHÉRENT 
   Découvrez un monde de jeu riche et profond, où des événements horribles façonnent la vie de populations entières tandis que des monstres sanguinaires se déchaînent.
   Explorez des lieux aussi nombreux que variés, allant des comptoirs commerciaux animés jusqu'aux villes minières agitées, en passant par les imposants châteaux et forteresses, et découvrez leur histoire et leurs sombres secrets.        
 
  TECHNOLOGIE DE POINTE 
   Immergez-vous dans un monde crédible et plein de vie, offrant de splendides graphismes et utilisant des mécaniques de jeu sophistiquées rendues possibles par le REDengine, le moteur maison de CD PROJEKT RED.   À PROPOS DE THE WITCHER 2 ENHANCED EDITION L'Enhanced Edition propose un tas de nouveaux contenus passionnants.
   Plusieurs heures de jeu additionnelles : de nouvelles aventures prenant place dans des lieux inédits, prolongeant l'histoire et introduisant de nouveaux personnages, mystères et monstres.
   Nouvelle introduction du jeu et nouvelles cinématiques : nouvelles animations et cinématiques, dont une nouvelle cinématique d'introduction précalculée, réalisée par Tomasz Bagiński, primé par la BAFTA et nominé aux Oscars.
   Tous les contenus téléchargeables et améliorations apportés par la version 2.0 du jeu, incluant :
   Mode Arène : un mode arcade qui permet aux joueurs de combattre contre des vagues sans fin d'ennemis pour mettre à l'épreuve leurs talents de combattant.
   Un nouveau système de didacticiel étendu permettant aux joueurs de s'immerger en douceur dans l'univers du jeu et dans les aventures de Geralt.
   Mode Ténèbres : un niveau de difficulté conçu pour les joueurs acharnés, avec des objets spécialement dédiés à ce mode. À ce niveau de difficulté, l'accent est porté sur la préparation au combat, les manœuvres défensives et les attaques opportunistes.    
 The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition contient les articles bonus suivants :
   Bande originale officielle au format MP3
   Carte du monde de jeu
   Manuel des quêtes pour les fans de jeux de rôles novices ou expérimentés
   Manuel de jeu
   Bande dessinée numérique "Reasons of State"

Entdecke noch weitere Spiele von CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Entdecke noch weitere Spiele von CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Infos zum Spiel Der zweite Teil der Rollenspiel-Saga um den professionellen Monsterschlächter Geralt von Riva, The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings, entwickelt eine reife, nachdenklich stimmende Geschichte als Grundlage eines der ausgefeiltesten und einzigartigsten Rollenspiele für PC aller Zeiten.
 
 Es herrschen Zeiten unbeschreiblichen Durcheinanders. Mächtige Kräfte verstricken sich hinter den Kulissen in Kämpfe um Macht und Einfluss. Die Nördlichen Königreiche rüsten sich zum Krieg. Doch Armeen im Feld richten gegen blutige Verschwörungen nichts aus ... HAUPT-FEATURES  PACKENDE, REIFE, NICHT-LINEARE STORY 
   Tauche in eine komplexe, emotional aufgeladene, nicht-lineare Story in einer unvergleichlichen Fantasy-Welt ein.
   In diesem komplexen, expansiven Abenteuer kann jede Entscheidung schwerwiegende Konsequenzen haben.
   Erlebe über 40 Stunden erzählungsbasiertes Gameplay mit 4 verschiedenen Anfängen und 16 verschiedenen Enden.        
 
  SPEKTAKULÄRES, BRUTALES TAKTISCHES KAMPFSYSTEM 
   Erlebe ein Kampfsystem, das dynamische Action auf einzigartige Weise mit sorgfältig entwickelten RPG-Mechaniken kombiniert.
   Setze zahlreiche Hexerwaffen mit Nah- und Fernkampfoptionen ein.
   Bereite dich mit einer großen Bandbreite taktischer Optionen auf den Kampf vor: Braue Tränke, lege Fallen und Köder aus, wirke Magie und pirsche dich an deine Gegner heran.        
 
  REALISTISCHE, WEITLÄUFIGE, KONSISTENTE SPIELWELT 
   In dieser lebendigen, komplexen Welt beeinflussen obskure Geschehnisse das Leben ganzer Völker, und blutrünstige Monster treiben ihr Unwesen.
   Erkunde zahllose vielfältige Orte – lebendige Handelsposten, belebte Bergbaustädte, mächtige Schlösser und Festungen – und entdecke ihre Geschichten und finsteren Geheimnisse.        
 
  ZUKUNFTSWEISENDE TECHNIK 
   Erlebe eine glaubwürdige Welt, die lebt und atmet, mit wunderschönen Grafiken und ausgefeilten Spielmechaniken auf Basis der hauseigenen REDengine von CD PROJEKT RED.   ÜBER THE WITCHER 2 ENHANCED EDITION Die Enhanced Edition bringt jede Menge neue aufregende Inhalte mit.
   Zusätzliche Spielstunden: Neue Abenteuer an unbekannten Orten warten, erweitern die Story und führen neue Charaktere, Mysterien und Monster ein.
   Neue Spieleinführung und Filmsequenzen: Brandneue Animationen und Videosequenzen, darunter ein neues vorgerendertes Film-Intro des Oscar-nominierten BAFTA-Preisträgers Tomasz Bagiński.
   Alle DLCs und Verbesserungen der Version 2.0 des Spiels, darunter:
   Arena-Modus – ein Arcade-Modus mit endlosen Gegnerwellen, in dem Spieler ihre Kampfkünste erproben können.
   Neues, umfassendes Tutorialsystem, mit dem Spieler allmählich und komfortabel in die Spielwelt und in Geralts Abenteuer eintauchen können.
   Dunkler Modus – eine Schwierigkeitsstufe für Hardcore-Spieler mit einzigartigen finsteren Gegenständen. Auf dieser Schwierigkeitsstufe kommt es noch stärker auf die richtige Kampfvorbereitung, auf Abwehrmanöver und opportunistische Angriffe an.    
 The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition bringt die folgenden Bonusgegenstände mit:
   Offizieller Soundtrack im MP3-Format
   Karte der Spielwelt
   Missionshandbuch für Neulinge und erfahrene Rollenspiel-Fans
   Spielhandbuch
   Digitales Comicbuch "Reasons of State"

Scopri gli altri giochi di CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Scopri gli altri giochi di CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Informazioni sul gioco Il secondo titolo della saga GDR sul cacciatore di mostri professionista Geralt di Rivia, The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings, propone una storia matura e provocatoria che fornisce una tra le esperienze di ruolo più complesse mai create su PC.
 
 Un'era di caos senza precedenti è alle porte. Influenti forze si scontrano dietro le quinte in un braccio di ferro per ottenere il potere. I Regni Settentrionali si mobilitano per la guerra, ma gli eserciti in marcia non bastano a fermare una sanguinaria cospirazione... CARATTERISTICHE PRINCIPALI  STORIA NON LINEARE MATURA E COINVOLGENTE 
   Scopri un'immensa storia non lineare dal forte impatto emotivo ambientata in un mondo fantasy davvero unico.
   Affronta un'avventura lunga e complessa in cui ogni decisione ha delle conseguenze.
   Vivi più di 40 ore di gioco narrativo con 4 inizi e 16 finali diversi.        
 
  COMBATTIMENTO STRATEGICO, BRUTALE E SPETTACOLARE 
   Combatti grazie a profonde meccaniche GDR unite all'azione in tempo reale.
   Usa una vasta gamma di armi da witcher, con opzioni per il combattimento corpo a corpo e a distanza.
   Preparati alla battaglia con pozioni, trappole, incantesimi ed esche.        
 
  MONDO DI GIOCO VASTO, REALISTICO E COERENTE 
   Scopri un mondo ricco di eventi in grado di alterare il corso della vita di interi popoli sotto la costante minaccia di mostri assetati di sangue.
   Esplora luoghi come mercati brulicanti di attività, una fiorente città mineraria, imponenti castelli e spettacolari fortezze, e scopri le storie e gli inquietanti segreti che custodiscono.        
 
  TECNOLOGIA ALL'AVANGUARDIA 
   Vivi in un mondo realistico e pulsante arricchito da una grafica spettacolare resa possibile dalla tecnologia proprietaria di CD PROJEKT RED, il REDengine.   THE WITCHER 2: ENHANCED EDITION La Enhanced Edition offre nuovi e interessanti contenuti.
   Ore di gioco: nuove avventure ambientate in luoghi mai visti prima ampliano la storia e introducono nuovi personaggi, mostri e misteri.
   Nuova introduzione e nuovi filmati: animazioni tutte nuove e un filmato introduttivo pre-renderizzato diretto da Tomasz Bagiński, vincitore del BAFTA Award e nominato agli Academy Award.
   Tutti i DLC e le migliorie introdotte nella versione 2.0 del gioco, inclusi:
   Modalità Arena: una modalità che permette ai giocatori di affrontare infinite orde di nemici e mettere alla prova le proprie capacità.
   Un nuovo tutorial che introduce gradualmente i giocatori al mondo di gioco e alle avventure di Geralt.
   Modalità Oscura: un livello di difficoltà progettato per i giocatori veterani, con oggetti inquietanti e unici. A questo livello di difficoltà, sono ancor più fondamentali preparazione alla battaglia, manovre difensive e attacchi mirati.    
 The Witcher 2: Enhanced Edition contiene i seguenti elementi bonus:
   Colonna sonora ufficiale in formato MP3
   Mappa del mondo di gioco
   Guida delle missioni, utile sia per i principianti sia per i veterani
   Manuale di gioco
   Fumetto digitale "Reasons of State".

  About the Game The second installment in the RPG saga about professional monster slayer Geralt of Rivia, The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings spins a mature, thought-provoking tale to produce one of the most elaborate and unique role-playing games ever released on PC. 
 
 A time of untold chaos has come. Mighty forces clash behind the scenes in a struggle for power and influence. The Northern Kingdoms mobilize for war. But armies on the march are not enough to stop a bloody conspiracy... KEY FEATURES  IMMERSIVE, MATURE, NON-LINEAR STORY 
   Dive into an immense, emotionally-charged, non-linear story set in a fantasy world unlike any other. 
   Embark on a complex, expansive adventure in which every decision may lead to dire consequences. 
   Engage in over 40 hours of narrative-driven gameplay, featuring 4 different beginnings and 16 different endings.    
 
  SPECTACULAR, BRUTAL, TACTICAL COMBAT 
   Fight using a combat system that uniquely fuses dynamic action with well-developed RPG mechanics.
   Use an array of unique witcher weapons, featuring both melee and ranged options.
   Prepare for battle using a wide array of tactical options: craft potions, set traps and baits, cast magic and sneak up on your foes.    
 
  REALISTIC, VAST, CONSISTENT GAME WORLD 
   Discover a deep, rich game world where ominous events shape the lives of entire populations while bloodthirsty monsters rage about. 
   Explore numerous, varied locations: from vibrant trading posts, to bustling mining towns, to mighty castles and fortresses; and discover the stories they have to tell and dark secrets they hide.   
 
  CUTTING-EDGE TECHNOLOGY 
   Experience a believable living and breathing world, featuring beautiful graphics and utilizing sophisticated in-game mechanics made possible thanks to CD PROJEKT RED in-house technology, REDengine.    ABOUT THE WITCHER 2 ENHANCED EDITION The Enhanced Edition features lots of new and exciting content.
   Additional hours of gameplay: New adventures set in previously unseen locations, expanding the story and introducing new characters, mysteries and monsters.
   New game introduction and cinematics: All new animations and cutscenes, including a new pre-rendered cinematic intro directed by BAFTA Award winner and Academy Award nominee Tomasz Bagiński.
   All DLCs and improvements introduced in the 2.0 version of the game, including:
   Arena Mode — an arcade mode that allows players to fight against endless waves of enemies and test their combat skills.
   A new, extensive tutorial system, gradually and smoothly immersing players in the game world and Geralt’s adventures.
   Dark Mode — a difficulty level designed for hardcore players, with unique dark-themed items. At this difficulty level, even greater emphasis is placed on battle preparation, defensive maneuvers and opportunistic attacking.    
 The Witcher 2 Enhanced Edition comes with these bonus items: 
   Official soundtrack in MP3 format
   A map of the game's world
   A quest handbook for both novice and experienced role-playing fans
   Game manual
   “Reasons of State” digital comic book.

game.title: Half-Life
game.description: Named Game of the Year by over 50 publications, Valve's debut title blends action and adventure with award-winning technology to create a frighteningly realistic world where players must think to survive. Also includes an exciting multiplayer mode that allows you to play against friends and enemies around the world.

localized_description.text: Named Game of the Year by over 50 publications, Valve's debut title blends action and adventure with award-winning technology to create a frighteningly realistic world where players must think to survive. Also includes an exciting multiplayer mode that allows you to play against friends and enemies around the world.

Nombrado juego del año por más de 50 publicaciones, la ópera prima de Valve mezcla acción y aventuras con una tecnología galardonada con varios premios, en un mundo terriblemente realista en el que los jugadores deberán esforzarse por sobrevivir. También incluye un emocionante modo multijugador que te permite jugar contra amigos y enemigos de todo el mundo.

Nommé « Jeu de l'année » par plus de 50 magazines, ce titre de Valve mêle action et aventure grâce à une technologie primée et crée un monde au réalisme effrayant, où la survie des joueurs dépend de leur faculté de réflexion. Il comprend également un mode multijoueur qui permet aux amis et ennemis du monde entier de s'affronter au cours de parties acharnées.

Das von über 50 Magazinen zum Spiel des Jahres gekürte Spiel-Debüt von Valve ist eine Kombination aus Action und Adventure mit preisgekrönter Technologie, die eine beängstigende realistische Welt entstehen lässt, in der die Spieler Köpfchen brauchen, um zu überleben. Es gibt auch einen Mehrspielermodus, in dem Sie mit Spielern aus der ganzen Welt oder gegen sie spielen können.

Considerado Jogo do Ano por mais de 50 revistas, o título de estreia da Valve mistura ação e aventura com uma tecnologia galardoada para criar um mundo assustadoramente realista, onde os jogadores devem pensar para sobreviver. Também inclui um emocionante modo multi-jogador que permite que jogues contra amigos e inimigos em todo o mundo.

Valves debuttitel er kåret som Årets spil af over 50 publikationer og forener action og eventyr med prisvindende teknologi for at skabe en skræmmende realistisk verden, hvor spillerne skal tænke for at overleve. Spillet indeholder desuden en spændende multiplayer-tilstand, hvor du kan spille imod venner og fjender fra hele verden.

Giudicato "Gioco dell'anno" da più di 50 pubblicazioni, il titolo di debutto Valve abbina azione e avventura a una premiata tecnologia in grado di creare un mondo dal realismo impressionante, dove pensare è la chiave per la sopravvivenza. Il titolo include inoltre un'emozionante modalità multigiocatore che permette di giocare contro amici e nemici in tutto il mondo.

Dr. Gordon Freeman doesn't speak, but he's got a helluva story to tell. This first-person roller-coaster initiated a new era in the history of action games by combining engrossing gameplay, upgraded graphics, ingenious level design and a revolutionary story that may not be all that it seems, told not through cutscenes, but through the visual environment.

Dr. Gordon Freeman arrives late for work at 8:47 am in the Black Mesa Research Facility, using the advanced Black Mesa tram system that leads through the facility. He arrives at the Anomalous Materials Lab, his work place, and he is informed by the security officer that the scientists have a special experiment today, so he goes to the locker room and puts on the hazard suit. He goes to the lab's lower levels, and arrives at the Anti-Mass Chamber, where he is instructed that the specimen to be used that day is the rarest and also the most unstable specimen. He is tasked with pushing the specimen into the scanning beam of the Anti-Mass Spectrometer for analysis. However as soon as he pushes it, it explodes, and creates a sudden catastrophe called a "resonance cascade", opening a portal between Earth and a dimension called Xen. Freeman is apparently teleported to an alien planet and catches glimpses of various alien lifeforms, including a circle of Vortigaunts, shortly before blacking out.

game.title: Mouthwashing
game.description:
The five crew members of The Tulpar are stranded in the empty reaches of space, shrouded in perpetual sunset. God is not watching.

A narrative driven first-person horror game following the dying crew of a shipwrecked space freighter.

Who could have known what good ol’ Captain Curly was capable of? Guess he thought his crew dying alongside him was only right. But some men can’t even kill themselves properly. Maimed, limbless and unable to speak, but alive, Curly is now at the mercy of the crew he has doomed to a slow death.

The Pony Express long-haul galactic freighter Tulpar is stranded within an uncharted region of space. Emergency life support systems saved the Captain and crew of four. The ship will run out of power within six months, food rations long before that. Adriftfar off their shipment route, they know the chance of rescue nears zero. Opening the cargo hold is strictly prohibited by the company, but the contents could mean a prolonged chance of survival.

In the space freighter industry, there’s a saying:
“Hope to die, or for goodness sake, pray that everyone else did.”

localized_description.text:
Mouthwashing é um jogo de terror na primeira pessoa que acompanha a tripulação agonizante de um cargueiro espacial naufragado.

Quem poderia imaginar do que o velho Capitão Curly era capaz? Ele deve ter pensado que o mais certo era a tripulação morrer com ele. Mas alguns homens nem conseguem matar-se direito. Mutilado, sem membros e incapaz de falar, mas ainda assim vivo, Curly está agora à mercê da tripulação que condenou a uma morte lenta.

→ Sucumbe à loucura 
Acompanha as vidas da tripulação enquanto enfrentam a fome, o isolamento e uns aos outros. Afinal de contas, as pessoas nunca foram o teu ponto forte.

→ Sem salvação 
A nave vai ficar sem energia em seis meses. A comida não durará tanto.

→ Narrativa imersiva 
Presta atenção ao que te rodeia.

→ Sustos psicológicos 
Os teus olhos mentem-te.

→ Narrativa implacável 
Espera morrer ou, pelo amor de Deus, reza para que todos os outros tenham morrido.

game.title: Schedule I
game.description: From small-time dope pusher to kingpin - manufacture and distribute a range of drugs throughout the grungy city of Hyland Point. Expand your empire with properties, businesses, employees and more.

localized_description.text: From small-time dope pusher to kingpin - manufacture and distribute a range of drugs throughout the grungy city of Hyland Point. Expand your empire with properties, businesses, employees and more.

Schedule I drugs, substances, or chemicals are defined as drugs with no currently accepted medical use and a high potential for abuse.  - The Drug Enforcement Administration
 
 You're a small-time drug dealer rolling into a fresh town with no cash, no product and no connections. Build your drug empire from the ground up in the grungy west-coast city of Hyland Point. Contend against intensifying law enforcement and deadly cartel competitors to expand your empire and reach the peak of the underworld.
 
  
 Produce a range of  drugs  to satisfy your customers, each one with it's own unique production process. Discover  special recipes  to create new drug variants with special properties.
 
  
 Walk, skate or drive throughout Hyland Point to get product into the hands of customers. Hire  dealers  to handle distribution for you.
 
  
 Purchase new  properties  and hire  employees  to expand the scope and scale of your operations. Work with suppliers to build a fully automated production and distribution chain.
 
  
 This is a dangerous line of work - you'll have to contend with increasing  law enforcement , as well as deadly cartel competitors. Fight with fists, melee weapons or  firearms .
 
  
 A growing empire needs skilled management. Reach new heights in  co-op multiplayer .
